name: Skinny Scones (Hh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C).
2. Coat a medium-size baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a medium-size bowl, combine cereal, flour, raisins and brown sugar.
4. Add milk and melted margarine and mix thoroughly with a wooden spoon.
5. Drop by heaping tablespoonfuls onto baking sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm. Makes about 10 scones.
